canonical_definition: A character-level text modeling benchmark extracted from English Wikipedia and used to evaluate language model likelihood on short text chunks.
papers: Energy-Based Diffusion Language Models for Text Generation
Think while You Generate: Discrete Diffusion with Planned Denoising

definitions.text: A character-level text modeling benchmark extracted from English Wikipedia and used to evaluate language model likelihood on short text chunks.
definitions.paper: Energy-Based Diffusion Language Models for Text Generation

definitions.text: A character-level language modeling benchmark built from Wikipedia text segmented into 256-character chunks.
definitions.paper: Think while You Generate: Discrete Diffusion with Planned Denoising

relationships.paper: Energy-Based Diffusion Language Models for Text Generation
relationships.evidence: We use two text datasets: 1) Text8 (Mahoney, 2006), a relatively small-scale, character-level text modeling benchmark extracted from English Wikipedia, and 2) OpenWebText, an open-source replica of the unreleased WebText (Gokaslan & Cohen, 2019) dataset used to train GPT-2.
